blogs.title: Blogs
blogs.description: I love to write about software development, open-source, and my personal experiences. Here are some of the blogs that I've written.

myBook.title: My Book Will Be Here Soon! 📚
myBook.description: I'm currently working on my book. It will be a guide for beginners who want to learn Linux. I'm planning to publish it in the first quarter of 2025. Stay tuned!

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: I'm a software developer and I love to create open-source projects. Here are all the projects that I've created or contributed to.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions or just want to say hi. I'll try to get back to you ASAP!
